title: A validated forecasting model for optimizing dispatch schedules of PV-battery system in grid-connected apartment buildings
data_context: Measured PV and apartment electricity data with grid-connected BESS operation
project_relevance: Motivates the link between forecasts, storage operation, self-consumption, and grid interaction.

title: A Novel Approach to Day-Ahead Forecasting of Battery Discharge Profiles in Grid Applications Using Historical Daily Profiles
data_context: Historical measured BESS discharge profiles in grid applications
project_relevance: Supports the broader data-science framing of benchmarking forecasting methods for energy-storage-related time series.

title: Optimization and evaluation of operational and economic performance of grid-connected battery storage at different stages of battery health
method_or_focus: Operation and economic optimization under battery-health constraints
data_context: Grid-connected BESS operation and optimization study
project_relevance: Motivates why storage operation should not be treated as independent of battery health and operating objectives.

title: A Framework for Anomaly Cell Detection in Energy Storage Systems Based on Daily Operating Voltage and Capacity Increment Curves
data_context: Measured or operational ESS cell-monitoring data
project_relevance: Lightly motivates the safety and maintenance importance of BESS monitoring, without making diagnostics part of this project.

title: Variational Autoencoder Based Anomaly Detection in Large-Scale Energy Storage Power Stations
project_relevance: Reinforces that BESS operation involves reliability and monitoring concerns beyond simple energy buffering.

title: Remaining Available Energy Prediction for Energy Storage Batteries Based on Interpretable Generalized Additive Neural Network
project_relevance: Supports the idea that interpretable prediction models can help energy-storage operation and reliability.

title: Multi-year field measurements of home storage systems and their use in capacity estimation
main_theme: Battery field measurements and capacity estimation
method_or_focus: Capacity estimation from long-term field measurements
project_relevance: Motivates why real storage operation and capacity fade matter when considering renewable integration.

title: Enhancing Battery Lifetime in PV Battery Home Storage System Using Forecast Based Operating Strategies
method_or_focus: Forecast-based operating strategies for battery lifetime
data_context: PV home-storage operation study with forecast-based control
project_relevance: Motivates the general idea that forecasts can improve storage operation, lifetime, and renewable self-consumption.

title: What drives capacity degradation in utility-scale battery energy storage systems? The impact of operating strategy and temperature in different grid applications
method_or_focus: Capacity degradation under different grid applications
data_context: Utility-scale BESS operating-strategy and temperature modelling study
project_relevance: Motivates keeping battery degradation in mind while avoiding detailed degradation modelling in this project.

title: Techno-economic evaluation of stationary lithium-ion energy storage systems with special consideration of aging
data_context: Stationary lithium-ion storage modelling and application scenarios
project_relevance: Provides broader BESS context, including grid-service and aging-aware stationary storage applications.

title: SimSES: A holistic simulation framework for modeling and analyzing stationary energy storage systems
data_context: Software/framework for simulated stationary energy-storage systems
project_relevance: Provides background for possible future BESS simulation and reinforces why storage operation can be modelled explicitly

title: A comparative analysis of Machine Learning Techniques for short-term grid power forecasting and uncertainty analysis of Wave Energy Converters
method_or_focus: Short-term grid-power forecasting and prediction intervals
project_relevance: Directly motivates forecasting benchmarks, forecast horizons, and prediction-interval evaluation for WEC power.

title: Power production assessment for wave energy converters: Overcoming the perils of the power matrix
data_context: Research paper on WEC power production assessment
project_relevance: Supports using a power-matrix-style approximation while clearly motivating its limitations

title: MHKiT (Marine and Hydrokinetic Toolkit) - Python
method_or_focus: Open-source Python toolkit for marine renewable energy data and performance analysis
data_context: Official software reference for wave-resource and device-performance workflows
project_relevance: Supports a Python-first implementation using established marine-energy data-processing tools

title: Power Smoothing in a Wave Energy Conversion Using Energy Storage Systems: Benefits of Forecasting-Enhanced Filtering for Reduction in Energy Storage Requirements
method_or_focus: Forecast-enhanced filtering and storage requirement reduction
data_context: WEC simulation driven by wave or weather conditions with ESS smoothing analysis
project_relevance: Directly motivates connecting WEC power forecasts to storage-aware smoothing metrics.

title: A Hybrid Energy Storage System Integrated with a Wave Energy Converter: Data-Driven Stochastic Power Management for Output Power Smoothing
data_context: Simulated WEC output and hybrid storage smoothing study
project_relevance: Motivates the BESS/HESS framing and the idea that fast WEC power fluctuations may be better handled with hybrid storage.
